title: Unidentified henchman (the Cauldron)
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Otheruses|unidentified henchman}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Character |type=Corporate |image=[[File:Guide_of_Dooku.png]] |name=Unidentified henchman
(the Cauldron) |homeworld= |birth= |death=By [[22 BBY/Legends|21.95 BBY]],[[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] receives her [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Asajj Ventress's lightsabers/Legends|lightsabers]] after [[Death/Legends|killing]] the henchman in "[[Chapter 6 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 6]]" of ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]''. Ventress [[Duel on Yavin 4|duels]] the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] with those [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] in "[[Chapter 17 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 17]]," and ''[[The Clone Wars: Wild Space]]'' states that Skywalker was promoted to [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] from the rank of Padawan four [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], which occurred in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] as the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. Therefore, the henchman had died by four weeks after the Battle of Geonosis. Since ''The New Essential Chronology'' confirms one [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after the battle to be 21.95 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], and ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' states that one month was seven weeks, the henchman had died by 21.95 BBY. [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]]{{CW|6}} depicts the henchman's [[Death/Legends|death]] at [[the Cauldron]], which {{DB|location|rattatak|Rattatak}} establishes to be on [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]]. |species=[[Humanoid|Humanoid]]{{CW|6}} |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Green]] |skin=Blue-gray |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[The Cauldron]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I trust you will find what you seek.|The henchman, welcoming Dooku to the Cauldron's arena battles|translated=1|audio=Henchman1.flac|}} A [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] '''henchman''' of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems']] [[Head of State/Legends|leader]], [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], [[Administrator/Legends|administered]] [[the Cauldron]] [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]] arena on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The henchman provided Dooku with combatants in the [[Count/Legends|count's]] search for a new minion. However, as the henchman viewed the gladiators alongside Dooku, the host was suddenly [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] hopeful [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]], whom Dooku was nevertheless pleased to accept as his new [[Sith acolyte/Legends|acolyte]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Impressive. ''[…]'' You have great skill of infiltration. My host would applaud your abilities posthumously.|Dooku, noticing the assassination of the henchman|audio=Henchman2.flac|}} [[File:Henchman_welcome.png|thumb|left|300px|The henchman welcomes Count Dooku to the Cauldron gladiator arena.]] During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] served as an [[Administrator/Legends|administrator]] of [[the Cauldron]] [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]] pit{{CSWECite|I|112|Cauldron, the}} on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]].{{DB|location|rattatak|Rattatak}} A henchman of [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], a [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] and the [[Head of State/Legends|leader]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]],{{CSWECite|I|198|Dooku, Count}} the administrator welcomed Dooku to the arena prior to [[22 BBY/Legends|21.95 BBY]], by four [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] into the war. Dooku had arrived in [[Mission to Rattatak|search]] of a new minion among that [[Standard day/Legends|day's]] gladiatorial contestants. Having requested in advance for the Cauldron to be arranged in a particular manner, Dooku arrived aboard his [[Count Dooku's solar sailer/Legends|solar sailer]] and was greeted by the henchman, who promised him that everything had been prepared as desired. The administrator then led the guest into the arena for a personal viewing of the gladiatorial matches, wherein several combatants demonstrated their prowess before the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]]. Reaching a viewing box high above the Cauldron arena, Dooku and his henchman seated themselves and observed the battles below together. The two were watching the arena matches when the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] hopeful [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] suddenly infiltrated their box and silently [[Death/Legends|slew]] the henchman, placing herself in the seat next to [[Count/Legends|Count]] Dooku in the host's stead. Dooku nevertheless noticed the act, commenting that Ventress's victim would praise her skills of infiltration, albeit posthumously. After Ventress proceeded to demonstrate her own abilities by defeating all of the Cauldron's gladiators, Dooku was satisfied to accept the henchman's killer as his new [[Sith acolyte/Legends|acolyte]]. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|''«''Everything has been arranged precisely as you have requested…most illustrious Count Dooku.''»
"''Indeed.|The henchman and Count Dooku|audio=Henchman3.flac|noquote=1|}} [[File:RattatakWrestlemania-CW6.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Count Dooku and his henchman observed the arena battles from a private box.]] The henchman spoke with a deep voice a non-[[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] [[Language/Legends|language]] that was intelligible by Count Dooku. In addition, while hosting Dooku at the Cauldron arena, the henchman maintained a constant grin on his [[Color/Legends|blue-gray]] face, which also featured a pair of large, green [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. ==Equipment== The henchman donned a beige [[Robe/Legends|robe]] held in place over the left shoulder by three triangular khaki pins. A tall [[Clothing/Legends|headdress]] crowned the tight-fitting hood attached to the humanoid's largely unembellished robe. ==Behind the scenes== The henchman appears in "[[Chapter 6 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 6]]" of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated series. The episode first aired on [[November 14]], [[2003]] on [[Cartoon Network]]{{TVcom|url=shows/star-wars-clone-wars/chapter-vi-276612|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars - Season 1, Episode 6: Chapter VI}} and features [[Daran Norris]] providing the character's voice. The arena host was later identified as "Henchman" in the ''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' cast-and-crew list published on [[StarWars.com]] on [[March 22]], [[2004]].{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/castcrew.html|text=''Clone Wars'' Cast & Crew}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|soundcat=Audio files of unidentified henchman (the Cauldron)|imagecat=Images of unidentified henchman (the Cauldron)}} *[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Cine-Manga|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Cine-Manga]] *{{CW|6}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/castcrew.html|text=''Clone Wars'' Cast & Crew}} *{{DB|location|rattatak|Rattatak}} {{Po}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |fi=Dookun avustaja |pl=Zarządca areny na Rattataku }} [[Category:Administrators]] [[Category:Humanoids]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]]
